hero.title: Jaws
hero.reason: In honor of International Swimming Day, a thrilling movie about a great white shark that makes you think twice before diving into the ocean.
hero.blurb: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece still holds up today, with suspenseful scenes and impressive practical effects. It's a must-watch for any movie buff, and a great reminder to respect the power of the sea.

released.title: Evan Almighty
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this comedy classic stars Steve Carell as a modern-day Noah, and its lighthearted tone makes it a great family movie.
released.blurb: With a talented cast, including Morgan Freeman and Jonah Hill, this film is full of laughs and heartwarming moments. It's a fun and entertaining watch, even if it's not the most sophisticated comedy.

birthday.title: 24 Hour Party People
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Mica Levi, born June 24, 1985, a talented composer who worked on the film's soundtrack.
birthday.blurb: This British comedy-drama is a wild and energetic ride, with a talented cast and a unique soundtrack. It's a great example of British indie cinema, with a lot of heart and a lot of humor.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its convoluted plot and poor acting, making it a prime candidate for a dumpster dive.
awful.blurb: With a nonsensical plot and cringe-worthy performances, this film is so bad it's good. It's a trainwreck that you can't look away from, with a lot of unintentional humor and a healthy dose of schadenfreude.
